top_signals.title: Newcore Gold tanks as Enchi pre-feasibility disappoints
top_signals.summary: The PFS estimated an after-tax NPV of $496 million and an IRR of 37%.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Anglo American, Codelco to add 2.7Mt copper with no new mine
top_signals.summary: The companies will merge two of Chile's largest copper operations, increasing production by millions of tonnes over 20 years.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Canada eyes special status for Far North resource roads
top_signals.summary: The federal government is considering granting national interest status to the C$2-billion Mackenzie Valley Highway and Grays Bay Road and Port initiative.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Suspected attacker dies in crash after Gunma woman stabbed to death
top_signals.summary: A man who was believed to have fled the scene died in a car accident in neighboring Saitama Prefecture later in the day.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Shohei Ohtani delivers on mound, at plate as Dodgers sweep Twins
top_signals.summary: Mookie Betts went 3-for-4 with a double and a solo home run for ​Los Angeles, which completed a three-game road sweep against the ‌Twins.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
